case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. LISA BROWN-KINSELLA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN-KINSELLA, LISA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-30-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
